ab: nengi ita, setangi deddan azas pa patedan tu meniz sa damu mipil tu baqian.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去部落訪問耆老。
en: A: Hello everyone, today I’m taking you to the tribe to interview the elders.

ab: nengi ye! qatapun pa ita tu baqian temankebalan.
ch: B:好耶!我們要跟耆老說噶瑪蘭語。

ab: qaseq pa ita ti ni?
en: A: Are we almost there?

ab: qaseq pa ti.
en: B:Almost there.

ab: baqi, mawtu ti imi temayta timaisuan.
en: A: Grandpa, we’ve come to see you.

ab: suppaR imu temankebalan ka! maken satuRin!
ch: B:你們會說噶瑪蘭語啊!真是太棒了!
en: B: (sighs) You speak Karmic! That’s great!

ab: nengi ita, setangi deddan azas pa patudan tu meniz qatiw sa zenna kelawkaway.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去稻田工作。
en: A: Hello everyone, today my teacher is going to take you to work in the rice field.

ab: en, patudan
en: B: Yes, sir.

ab: qawtu ka paylit meniz, naRin kalingun paqangi ika mazas Ribang na kelawkaway.
ch: A:大家過來排隊，記得帶好工具。
en: A: Come and line up, remember to bring your tools.

ab: en, patudan, alan niaq ti Ribang na kelawkaway.
ch: B:是的，老師，我們都拿好工具了。
en: B: Yes, sir, we’ve got our tools.

ab: maseq ti ita ni?
en: A: Are we there yet?

ab: mai pama, medaud pama.
en: B: Not yet, it’s still far away.

ab: kunna ka puzanum aisu.
en: A: You go watering.

ab: kuwa, aiku pa puzanum.
en: B: Okay, I’ll water it.

ab: ala ka tu sabuRawan tu adam aisu.
en: A: You go get the bird catcher.

ab: kuwa, buRaw pa iku tu adam.
en: B: Okay, I’ll go and catch the birds.

ab: nengi ita, qatiw pa ita sa tunguyen setangi.
ch: A:大家好，我們今天要去動物園。
en: A: Hello everyone, we are going to the zoo today.

ab: nengi yu! naqunian ta pa matiw?
ch: B:好棒喔!我們要怎麼去呢?
en: B: Awesome! How are we going to get there?

ab: qabasu pa ita matiw.
en: A: Let’s take the bus.

ab: paylit ka meniz, pasaya pa ita Rasa tu paya.
ch: A:大家排好隊，我們準備買票。
en: A: Everyone line up, we are ready to buy tickets.

ab: en.
en: B: Yes.

ab: ta ngayaw nani nizu adam ay, ta tuRuz nani nizu siqqay ay, aimu pa temayta.
ch: A:前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。
en: A: There are birds in the front and snakes in the back.

ab: patudan maytis iku tu siqqay.
en: B: I’m afraid of snakes.

ab: quni, nayau si qatiw ka tayta tu adam aisu.
en: A: It doesn’t matter, then you go and watch the birds.

ab: ussiq dukian tanan ka qalisimpu pa ita tazian.
ch: A:我們一個小時後回來集合。
en: A: We’ll be back in an hour.

ab: kuwa, wanay patudan.
en: B: Yes, thank you.

ab: temayta isu tu niana setangi?
en: A: What did you see today?

ab: temayta iku tu muwaza siqqay, yau pama muwaza adam.
ch: B:我看到了好多蛇，還有好多鳥。
en: B: I saw a lot of snakes and a lot of birds.

ab: qalazuk ka, qawi ya ti imi.
en: A: Hurry up, we have to go.

ab: palana iku, pilay zapan ku.
en: B: Wait for me, my feet are tired.

ab: qasulun pa ita matiw menanguy qanengi ni?
en: A: Shall we go swimming together?

ab: kuwa ya! ni ya!
en: B:Yes! Let’s go!

ab: mazemun lazat tazian menanguy.
en: A: There are a lot of people swimming here.

ab: iRebeng zanum tayan, tazian pa ita menanguy nengi ti.
ch: B:那裡水很深，我們在這裡游泳就好。
en: B: The water is deep there, so we just swim here.
